name: Magic Peach Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the melted butter into a glass baking dish.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and milk until combined.
3. Pour the batter over the melted butter in the baking dish.
4. Arrange the sliced peaches on top of the batter.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
